MARISAMOD-CHARGE_UP_POWER.title: Charge-Up
MARISAMOD-CHARGE_UP_POWER.description: For every [blue]8[/blue] stacks of Charge-Up,double the damage of your next Attack.
MARISAMOD-CHARGE_UP_POWER.smartDescripti: your next Attack will deal [blue]{Mult}[/blue] times damage.
MARISAMOD-BOUND_OF_PROTAGONISTS_POWER.de: Next times you would lose Hp, lose half that amount instead.
MARISAMOD-BOUND_OF_PROTAGONISTS_POWER.sm: Next {Amount} times you would lose Hp, lose half that amount instead.
MARISAMOD-CASKET_OF_STAR_POWER.title: Casket of Stars
MARISAMOD-CASKET_OF_STAR_POWER.descripti: [gold]Sparks[/gold] gain [gold]Retain[/gold].Whenever you gain 3 or more [gold]Block[/gold], also gain a [gold]Spark[/gold] card.
MARISAMOD-CASKET_OF_STAR_POWER.smartDesc: [gold]Sparks[/gold] gain [gold]Retain[/gold].Whenever you gain 3 or more [gold]Block[/gold], add a [gold]Spark[/gold] card to your hand.
MARISAMOD-CASKET_OF_STAR_PLUS_POWER.desc: [gold]Sparks[/gold] gain [gold]Retain[/gold].Whenever you gain 3 or more [gold]Block[/gold], also gain an upgraded [gold]Spark[/gold] card.
MARISAMOD-CASKET_OF_STAR_PLUS_POWER.smar: [gold]Sparks[/gold] gain [gold]Retain[/gold].Whenever you gain 3 or more [gold]Block[/gold], add an upgraded [gold]Spark[/gold] card to your hand.
MARISAMOD-MILLISECOND_PULSARS_POWER.desc: Your [gold]Amplify[/gold] effects no longer need additional energy.
MARISAMOD-MILLISECOND_PULSARS_POWER.smar: Your [gold]Amplify[/gold] effects no longer need additional energy.
MARISAMOD-PULSE_MAGIC_POWER.title: Pulse Magic
MARISAMOD-PULSE_MAGIC_POWER.description: This turn, your [gold]Amplify[/gold] effects no longer need additional energy.
MARISAMOD-PULSE_MAGIC_POWER.smartDescrip: This turn, your [gold]Amplify[/gold] effects no longer need additional energy.
MARISAMOD-ENERGY_FLOW_POWER.title: Energy Flow
MARISAMOD-ENERGY_FLOW_POWER.description: Gain [gold]Charge-Up[/gold] at the end of your turn.
MARISAMOD-ENERGY_FLOW_POWER.smartDescrip: At the end of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Charge-Up[/gold].
MARISAMOD-ESCAPE_VELOCITY_POWER.title: Escape Velocity
MARISAMOD-ESCAPE_VELOCITY_POWER.descript: If you end your turn with cards in [gold]Hand[/gold],draw that many cards (up to 2}) next turn.
MARISAMOD-ESCAPE_VELOCITY_POWER.smartDes: If you end your turn with cards in [gold]Hand[/gold],draw that many cards (up to {Amount}) next turn.
MARISAMOD-EVENT_HORIZON_POWER.title: Event Horizon
MARISAMOD-EVENT_HORIZON_POWER.descriptio: Once each turn,whenever you active an [gold]Amplify[/gold] effect,you may put an [gold]Attack[/gold] from [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] to [gold]Hand[/gold].
MARISAMOD-EVENT_HORIZON_POWER.smartDescr: Up to {Amount} {Amount:plural:time|times}) each turn, whenever you active an [gold]Amplify[/gold] effect,you may put an [gold]Attack[/gold] from [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] to [gold]Hand[/gold].
MARISAMOD-EVENT_HORIZON_POWER.selectionS: Choose a card to put back in your Hand.
MARISAMOD-FLIGHT_POWER.title: Flight
MARISAMOD-FLIGHT_POWER.description: Attack damage you receive is halved until you take unblocked attack damage.
MARISAMOD-FLIGHT_POWER.smartDescription: Attack damage you receive is halved until you take unblocked attack damage {Amount} time(s).
MARISAMOD-WITCH_OF_GREED_POTION_POWER.de: At the end of combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Potion[/gold].
MARISAMOD-WITCH_OF_GREED_POTION_POWER.sm: At the end of combat, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Potion(s)[/gold].
MARISAMOD-ONE_TIME_OFF_POWER.title: One Time Off
MARISAMOD-ONE_TIME_OFF_POWER.description: Will not activate [gold]Amplify[/gold] or [gold]Charge-Up[/gold] until end of turn.
MARISAMOD-ONE_TIME_OFF_POWER.smartDescri: Will not activate [gold]Amplify[/gold] or [gold]Charge-Up[/gold] until end of turn.
MARISAMOD-ORRERYS_SUN_POWER.title: Orrerys Sun
MARISAMOD-ORRERYS_GALAXY_DAMAGE_POWER.sm: Your [gold]Starlit[/gold] deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] more damage each stack.
MARISAMOD-MAGIC_AND_RED_DREAM_POWER.desc: Draw 2 cards then put a card from your [gold]Hand[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] when you activate an [gold]Amplify[/gold] or [gold]Charge-Up[/gold] effect.
MARISAMOD-MAGIC_AND_RED_DREAM_POWER.smar: Draw {Amount} cards then put a card from your [gold]Hand[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] when you activate an [gold]Amplify[/gold] or [gold]Charge-Up[/gold] effect.
MARISAMOD-MAGIC_AND_RED_DREAM_POWER.sele: Choose Cards to put on top of your Draw Pile
MARISAMOD-MAXIMISE_POWER_POWER.title: Full Power
MARISAMOD-MAXIMISE_POWER_POWER.descripti: your Attack damage is increased by [blue]50%[/blue] until end of turn.
MARISAMOD-MAXIMISE_POWER_POWER.smartDesc: your Attack damage is increased by [blue]{Mult}%[/blue] until end of turn.
MARISAMOD-POLARIS_UNIQUE_POWER.title: Polaris Unique
MARISAMOD-POLARIS_UNIQUE_POWER.smartDesc: Cost of [gold]Polaris Unique[/gold] is increased by {Amount:energyIcons()}.
MARISAMOD-PROP_BAG_POWER.title: Prop Bag
MARISAMOD-PROP_BAG_POWER.description: Remove your last relic at the end of combat.
MARISAMOD-PROP_BAG_POWER.smartDescriptio: Remove your last [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:relic|relics} at the end of combat.
MARISAMOD-SATELLITE_ILLUSION_POWER.title: Satellite Illusion
MARISAMOD-SATELLITE_ILLUSION_POWER.descr: Gain energy when the number of cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] increases after you play a card.
MARISAMOD-SATELLITE_ILLUSION_POWER.smart: Gain {Amount:energyIcons()} when the number of cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] increases after you play a card.
MARISAMOD-SINGULARITY_POWER.title: Singularity
MARISAMOD-SINGULARITY_POWER.description: When you play a card that cost 0 energy,increase the damage of a random Attack in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
MARISAMOD-SINGULARITY_POWER.smartDescrip: When you play a card that cost 0 energy,increase the damage of a random Attack in your [gold]Hand[/gold] by {Amount}.
MARISAMOD-SPRINKLE_STAR_N_HEART_POWER.de: Your [gold]Starlit[/gold] will not be removed upon trigger until your next turn.
MARISAMOD-SPRINKLE_STAR_N_HEART_POWER.sm: Your [gold]Starlit[/gold] will not be removed upon trigger until your next turn.
MARISAMOD-STARLIT_POWER.title: Starlit
MARISAMOD-STARLIT_POWER.description: Deal damage to all enemies and gain [gold]Block[/gold] at the end of your turn.
MARISAMOD-STARLIT_POWER.smartDescription: Deal [blue]{DamageEot}[/blue] damage to all enemies and gain [blue]{BlockEot}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] at the end of your turn.
MARISAMOD-SUPER_NOVA_POWER.title: Super Nova
MARISAMOD-SUPER_NOVA_POWER.description:
Your cards gain [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
[gold]Burn[/gold] no longer deal damage to you.
Gain [gold]Strength[/gold] when a [gold]Burn[/gold] is [gold]Burnt[/gold].
MARISAMOD-SUPER_NOVA_POWER.smartDescript:
Your cards gain [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
[gold]Burn[/gold] no longer deal damage to you.
Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] when a [gold]Burn[/gold] is [gold]Burnt[/gold].
MARISAMOD-WALPURGISNACHT_POWER.title: Walpurgisnacht
MARISAMOD-WALPURGISNACHT_POWER.descripti:
At the start of your turn, [gold]Enchant[/gold] a random card in your hand with [gold]Starlit[/gold].
Whenever you play an [gold]enchanted[/gold] card, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} next turn.
MARISAMOD-WALPURGISNACHT_POWER.smartDesc:
At the start of your turn, [gold]Enchant[/gold] [blue]{Amount}[/blue] random {Amount:plural:card|cards} in your hand with [gold]Starlit[/gold].
Whenever you play an [gold]enchanted[/gold] card, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} next turn.
